summary: Frontend testing of TRUCKERS NAV BY TUE app iteration 81. Verified all 3 P0 changes: (1) Map CSS filter removed - HERE satellite tiles show native colors without brightness/sepia/hue-rotate filter, (2) NavigationHUD and Route Comparison Panel have gold/black signature theme applied, (3) Truck profile defaults correctly set to recommended specs (13.5ft height, 78500 lbs weight, 53ft length, 8.5ft width, 5 axles, 12000 lbs/axle, 1 trailer). All 7 features tested and working.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Map CSS filter removal - index.html lines 33-42 now just a comment, no brightness/sepia/hue-rotate filter applied
VERIFIED: hereMapUtils.ts line 45 no longer adds 'here-map-satellite-dark' class to map canvas
VERIFIED: HERE logistics.satellite.day tiles display native/natural colors
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD has black background (rgba(0,0,0,0.95)) with gold border (#D4AF37/40%)
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD Lane Guidance text is gold (#D4AF37)
VERIFIED: Lane arrows in LaneRibbon use gold (#D4AF37) for active lanes instead of blue
VERIFIED: Route Comparison Panel header has gold text (#D4AF37), gold border, black background
VERIFIED: Route Comparison Panel GO button styled with gold (#D4AF37)
VERIFIED: Truck Profile defaults in FirebaseProvider.tsx: height=13.5, weight=78500, length=53, width=8.5, axleCount=5, axleWeight=12000, trailerCount=1
VERIFIED: App.tsx line 270 fallback truck defaults match the same values
VERIFIED: Settings view displays correct truck specifications: Height 13.5 ft, Weight 78,500 lbs, Length 53 ft, Width 8.5 ft, Axle Count 5, Axle Weight 12,000 lbs, Trailer Count 1
VERIFIED: Route calculation to Dallas TX works - shows 3 route alternatives with gold route polyline
VERIFIED: Vehicle restrictions and traffic overlays visible on map

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: App successfully uses HERE Maps JS API v3.1 with logistics.satellite.day tiles showing native colors (no CSS filter). NavigationHUD and Route Comparison Panel have gold/black signature theme. Truck profile defaults are 13.5/78500/53/8.5/5/12000/1. Map tilt is 55° by default. Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

map_css_filter_removal.details: Map has NO CSS filter applied - HERE satellite tiles show native/natural colors. No 'here-map-satellite-dark' class found on canvas elements.

navigation_hud_gold_theme.details: NavigationHUD has black background (rgba(0,0,0,0.95)) with gold border (#D4AF37). Lane Guidance text is gold.

lane_ribbon_gold_arrows.details: LaneRibbon component uses gold (#D4AF37) for active lane arrows instead of blue (#4285F4)

route_comparison_panel_theme.details: Route Comparison Panel header has gold text (#D4AF37), gold border, black background. GO button color is rgb(212, 175, 55).

truck_profile_defaults.details: All truck specs show correct defaults: Height=13.5ft, Weight=78,500lbs, Length=53ft, Width=8.5ft, Axle Count=5, Axle Weight=12,000lbs, Trailer Count=1

here_maps_satellite_tiles.details: HERE logistics.satellite.day tiles load correctly with native colors

vehicle_restrictions_traffic_overlays.details: Truck restrictions panel visible showing toll booth warning. Traffic flow overlays visible on map.

known_issues.geolocation: Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa via IP geolocation fallback. Expected behavior.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, Mapbox, etc.)
